title: TEXT value interpreted as column name in an index with empty list in an IN expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INTEGER, c1 VARCHAR, c2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t0(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14);

SPARQL INSERT { GRAPH <http://example.org/t1> { ?s ?p ?o } } WHERE { SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE { ?s <http://example.org/c0> 1 . ?s <http://example.org/c1> 'test' . ?s <http://example.org/c2> 3.14 . } LIMIT 1 };
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE c1 IN ('value1', 'value2');
key_bug_features: Empty IN list causes TEXT to be treated as column name
